title: Colourful Leather Armour
description: Makes dyed leather more colourful(colorful) by changing the brown patches.
body:
# Colourful Leather Armour
The resource pack changes dyed leather armour to be more colourfull. It changes the brown parts of the dyed leather armour so they are dyed as well. This also works for holding leather armour items.
![All Dyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d106998888a2bd98836a4f83cf9ae9225b82f0e7.jpeg)
